content.text: A single DICE Queue consisting of all Workers' Comp and Personal Injury leads that the Intake Team need to call, in the specified priortity.
-Priority within Intake Statuses will be based off of Case Type(Report) field:
Status = Intake Scheduled; Lead Generated; In Contact/Under Review; Missed Appointment; Intake Package Sent; Attempting to Contact; Questionnaire

items.fromString: A single DICE Queue consisting of all Workers' Comp and Personal Injury leads that the Intake Team need to call, in the specified priortity.
items.toString:
A single DICE Queue consisting of all Workers' Comp and Personal Injury leads that the Intake Team need to call, in the specified priortity. 

Requirements/Notes: 

*Priority*

-First Priority based on Intake Status 

# Intake Scheduled
# Lead Generated
# In Contact/Under Review
# Missed Appointment
# Intake Package Sent
# Attempting to Contact
# Questionnaire

-Priority within Intake Statuses will be based off of Case Type(Report) field:

# Labor Law
# MVA
# Premises
# Personal Injury
# Worker’s Compensation

*Query* 

-Filters:

# Call At Date >= NOW
# Type = Workers’ Compensation, Personal Injury
# Status = Intake Scheduled; Lead Generated; In Contact/Under Review; Missed Appointment; Intake Package Sent; Attempting to Contact; Questionnaire

h1. User Guide: Lead Queue Viewer System

h2. Quick Start

The Lead Queue Viewer helps you manage legal intake records efficiently. You can access it in two ways:

* _Full Dashboard_: Complete view with statistics and filters
* _Utility Bar_: Compact view for quick access



h2. Basic Workflow

h3. 1. Get Your Next Assignment

* Click _"Get Next Record"_ to automatically get the highest priority record
* The system opens the record in a new tab
* You can only have one assignment at a time

h3. 2. Work on the Record

* Complete your intake tasks in the opened record
* Use the _Claim Record Button_ if viewing a specific record

h3. 3. Release When Done

* Click _"Release My Records"_ when finished
* The record becomes available for others
* You can now get your next assignment



h2. Dashboard Features

h3. Statistics Tiles
Click any tile to filter records:

* _All Leads_: Total records in queue
* _High Priority_: Urgent records needing attention
* _In Contact_: Records where contact was made
* _No Contact_: Records still being contacted
* _Retainer Sent_: Records with packages sent

h3. Filters

* _Status_: Filter by intake status
* _Case Type_: Filter by legal case type
* _Due Date_: Show records due today, this week, or next week
* _Clear_: Remove all filters

h3. Record Table

* _Click record name_: Open full record details
* _"Assign to Me"_: Claim a specific record
* _Sort columns_: Click column headers



h2. Utility Bar (Compact View)

h3. No Assignment

* Shows _"Get Next Record"_ button
* Click to get your next assignment

h3. Has Assignment

* Shows assigned record name and status
* Displays timer showing how long assigned
* Shows _"Release My Records"_ button



h2. Claim Record Button

When viewing an individual record:

* _"Claim Record"_: Available when you have no assignments
* _"Release this Record"_: Available when you're assigned to this record
* _Warning message_: Shows when you have a different record assigned



h2. Common Issues

_"You already have an Intake claimed"_

* Release your current assignment first

_"No records available"_

* Check your filters or refresh the page

_Assignment not showing_

* Wait a few seconds or refresh the page



h2. Tips

* _Start with High Priority_: Click the "High Priority" tile for urgent records
* _One at a time_: You can only be assigned to one record
* _Use filters_: Focus on specific types of records
* _Check due dates_: Use "Due Today" filter for time-sensitive records
* _Keep utility bar open_: For quick status checks while working
